scripts.clean: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const dir = path.join(__dirname, '../core/wwwroot/App_Plugins/BetterIcons'); if (fs.existsSync(dir)) { fs.rmSync(dir, { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.mkdirSync(dir, { recursive: true }); }"
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:U13 && npm run build:U14
